_note: Rare loot/item showcase: glowing legendary item center-frame with dramatic presentation. The 'I FOUND THIS' / 'NEW LEGENDARY' / 'BEST WEAPON IN THE GAME' category. Item is the hero, character reacts to it, game environment frames the scene.
template: {game} video game scene: {item} glowing with legendary rarity aura in the center, {subject} reaching toward it with {reaction} expression, authentic {game} environment, item radiates {glow_color} energy particles, {palette} palette, {lighting}, dramatic item presentation, clean zone for composited text
negative: text, letters, words, watermark, blurry, low contrast, generic item, unrelated game, dark muddy, no glow

rubric.item_prominence: 1-5 — is the item the clear hero of the image?
